itemListElement.reviewBody: Euro school is a money many racket. They charge a hefty fee and keep increasing it yearly by 7 to 8% per year. The extra curricular activities the annual day function comes with a cost which also increases yearly. The teachers have just a year or two experience. They do not focus on education but on everything else that can extract money from parents. Starting from top down right from the principal to the teacher and coordinators no one feels responsible to explain or understand concerns raised by parents vai emails which are happily ignored. Books are not corrected on time. They don't bother if the child doesn't write in school. The Marathi teacher when asked by kids to explain Marathi words in English she says she doesn't know English. What kind of school and teacher are these. Trust me Euro school kharadi is just here to make money cause they know that people in and around this area are mostly from the IT sector and they feel they make pots of money to be given to schools as charity. But the school needs to understand and make things right before they start losing business.

I recently had an interaction with Euro School, and I feel compelled to share my feedback.

I encountered challenges with the timing and responsiveness during the inquiry process. Despite multiple inquiries and a scheduled call with a counselor, there was a noticeable huge delay, creating an impression akin to a government school's approach.

I believe effective communication is vital in such matters.

PLEASE DO NOT SEND YOUR KIDS TO THIS SCHOOL. YOU WILL REGRET YOUR DECISION EVERYDAY AS I DID FOR 2 years.

Well no words left for this school and management. I have taken out my both kids out of this school and there are many reasons for it. Let me summarise few examples and details.

Safety- 1) parents are allowed in school for pickup and let me tell you literally any1 can step in. Casually checking of ID cards, display any card and enter. 2) Fire drill in school brought utter chaos, 6-7 grade kids were holding fire extinguishers. High stampede chances as no experience in managing drill drills.

Education- No focus on studies. No means literally none.

We had a fulfilling conversation with Rekha ma’am the counsellor of euro school kharadi. She was thorough and diligent in explaining our doubts and queries. School’s great infrastructure is icing on the cake.

My kid study here. I regret taking admission here. They have more students less teacher. If you complains to Malika mam (Princi) for anything. She will give automated reply. If both the parents are working then do not take admission here. I am already looking for options.
We had a good experience during enquiry and admission process. Rekha mam helped us with all relevant details and clarified all doubts. Great to be associated with Euroschool.

They did not provide the basic academic where too many mistake found in text book and home worked did not checked my teacher and blindlly marked as signged evenof wrong answer.

Too many child admission. there are 12 section in GARDE -2 and 38 students in one class where teacher have did not have time delivered the class.
Safelly isssue.

If you want to raise a concern then no one listen you either throgh mail or want to setup a meeting with Principal mam , she denied to meet with parents,

Shcool hired third part spots teacher and tey changed very frequanttly  before kids settle with teacher.

Safelly issue like did are not aviable ouside bathroom where kids are fighting to each other and child need any help in washroom.

One thing is very good in shcool show off and advertsiment. but basic academic is very bad..

Dear parents i hope this will be helpful to decide school.

We are new to Pune and visited multiple schools in and around Kharadi/Viman nagar location for our daughter’s admission. We found Euro School Kharadi as one of the best amongst all. The interaction with the admission coordinator Rekha was great and she was very transparent in terms of the expectations. School is great for the location, infrastructure, teachers and facilities that they provide. The overall process right from the enquiry to admission was smooth and no issues whatsoever. I have huge expectations from Euro school for my daughter and hope they live up to the standards.

Recently we took admission in Euro School Kharadi for my daughter in grade 3. Reema Kamdar from admissions was handling the process. She displayed commendable professionalism and transparency of school polices. Effective communications, adherence to policies and fairness was evident. Overall the dedication to fairness and professionalism is commendable.

Euro school in Kharadi is the best school in town
My son loves to go to school
The staff and teachers take good care of kids

I have undergone the process from admission until now and the staff like Reema from Admin and finance department is the best in all
Reema is like the glu in between parents and school who holds and support immediately as and whenever we have some query or issues
She supported us from the beginning and still guide us and reroute to the proper channel
Reema motivates and encourage us to put out child to specific activities or sports or extra curriculum which happens in school
Being a parent we are concerned about the child when it comes to extra curriculum activity
But due to Reema we have always got the right path and encouragement
I want to shout out and appreciate and say Thank you to Reema for the amazing administrative professional attitude, your hard work, positive attitude and supporting nature makes our job as a parent much more easier.
We both Revansh parents would like to thank you for everything you do and still do it with smile on your face
